content.text:
```mdl
@ Contract: Confidentiality and Non‑Disclosure Agreement governing the inspection of the stockholder list
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_14_nda_3

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – Parties
type Party = {
    name: string,
    agrees_to_delaware_jurisdiction: bool,
    acknowledges_irreparable_harm: bool
}

@ Clause 2 – Confidential Material
type ConfidentialMaterial = {
    description: string,
    is_stockholder_list: bool,
    includes_analyses: bool,
    includes_verbal: bool          # hypothesis: may include verbally conveyed information
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – The two parties to the agreement
entity company: Party
entity stockholder: Party

@ Clause 2 – The material that is subject to confidentiality
entity confidential_material: ConfidentialMaterial

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fields used in rules (modeling state)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – Stockholder’s use of the material
entity stockholder_use: {
    used_for_other_purposes: bool,
    has_disclosed: bool,
    notice_given_within_2_days: bool,
    unauthorized_amendment_attempted: bool
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Functions (optional helpers)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
func is_prohibited_use(use: stockholder_use) -> bool:
    use.used_for_other_purposes

func is_prohibited_disclosure(use: stockholder_use) -> bool:
    use.has_disclosed

func is_notice_timely(use: stockholder_use) -> bool:
    use.notice_given_within_2_days

func is_unauthorized_amendment(use: stockholder_use) -> bool:
    use.unauthorized_amendment_attempted

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – Obligations, Prohibitions, Permissions
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – Use of Confidential Material only for permitted purposes
rule F stockholder_use_for_other_purposes:
    is_prohibited_use(stockholder_use) always

@ Clause 2 – No disclosure, publication or communication of Confidential Material
rule F stockholder_disclose_confidential_material:
    is_prohibited_disclosure(stockholder_use) always

@ Clause 3 – Prompt notice when disclosure is legally required
rule O stockholder_provide_notice:
    is_notice_timely(stockholder_use) always

@ Clause 4 – Jurisdiction of the Delaware Court of Chancery
rule O party_agrees_to_delaware_jurisdiction:
    company.agrees_to_delaware_jurisdiction and
    stockholder.agrees_to_delaware_jurisdiction always

@ Clause 5 – Recognition of irreparable harm and entitlement to injunctive relief
rule O party_recognizes_irreparable_harm:
    company.acknowledges_irreparable_harm and
    stockholder.acknowledges_irreparable_harm always

@ Clause 6 – Amendments must be in writing and signed
rule F unauthorized_amendment:
    is_unauthorized_amendment(stockholder_use) always

@ Clause 8 – Governing law of the State of Delaware
rule O governing_law_is_delaware:
    true always   # implicit – the rule encodes the choice of law

@ Clause 2 – Hypothesis: Confidential Information may include verbally conveyed information
rule P confidential_material_may_include_verbal:
    confidential_material.includes_verbal always
```
